name: shadow-credit-zk
description: ZK circuits for Shadow Credit Network

scripts.prepare-phase2: snarkjs powersoftau prepare phase2 powersoftau/pot10_final.ptau powersoftau/pot10_final.ptau
scripts.setup: snarkjs groth16 setup build/credit_data_validator.r1cs powersoftau/pot10_final.ptau build/circuit_0000.zkey
scripts.contribute: echo 'dev-contribution' | snarkjs zkey contribute build/circuit_0000.zkey build/circuit_final.zkey --name="First contribution" -v
scripts.export-vkey: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/circuit_final.zkey build/verification_key.json
scripts.full-setup: npm run compile && npm run setup-ptau && npm run prepare-phase2 && npm run setup && npm run contribute && npm run export-vkey && npm run export-verifier
